conclusion: INVALID — health check hit a foreign tenant server on default port 8000; our server lost the bind race and all requests failed with zero metrics. Fixed by pinning lab serve experiments to port 18192 and adding a runner sanity gate (primary metric must be > 0). Kept as the lab's first honest failure record.
